apply: Calculate the value of export and import in foreign trade.
Identify the different types of foreign exchange rates and their effects.
Explain the concept of balance of payments (BOP) and its components.
analyze: Analyze the impact of international trade on the economy of a country.
Discuss the advantages and disadvantages of international trade.
Explain the role of export promotion councils in promoting exports.
remember: Explain the concept of International Business.
Identify the types of foreign trade: import, export, and re-export.
understand: Describe the factors influencing international trade.
Explain the importance of international trade.
Discuss the role of Multinational Corporations (MNCs) in international trade.

ncert_objectives: To explain the concept of International Business.
To define the terms export, import, and foreign trade.
To describe the factors influencing international trade.
board_exam_objectives: To calculate the value of export and import in foreign trade.
To explain the concept of balance of payments (BOP) and its components.
To discuss the impact of international trade on the economy of a country.
